zh.lifeSummary: 當Nancy J. Stampe於1579年9月21日出生在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登時，她的父親Timothy Stampe27歲，母親Mary Marie Gunner18歲。她於大約1597年與John Thomas Creel III在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1628年在她的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nancy J. Stampe于1579年9月21日出生在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登时，她的父亲Timothy Stampe27岁，母亲Mary Marie Gunner18岁。她于大约1597年与John Thomas Creel III在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1628年在她的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stampe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt.
German: habitational name from a place so named near Kiel.

nameMeanings.name: Nancy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nancie
meanings: Of uncertain origin. Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Nancy J. Stampe was born on 21 September 1579, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, her father, Timothy Stampe, was 27 and her mother, Mary Marie Gunner, was 18. She married John Thomas Creel III about 1597, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1628, in her hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nancy J. Stampe est née le 21 septembre 1579, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Timothy Stampe, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Marie Gunner, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John Thomas Creel III environ 1597, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1628, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Nancy J. Stampe(이)가 1579년 9월 21일 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Timothy Stampe(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Marie Gunner(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1597년 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 John Thomas Creel III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1628년 그녀의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nancy J. Stampe родилась 21 сентября 1579 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Timothy Stampe было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Marie Gunner, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thomas Creel III около 1597 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1628 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.
